title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: A roundup of recent humanoid robot releases including China's JAKA Pi with split AI brain control, Vietnam's Dyno and VR-H3 robots for industrial and service applications, and NVIDIA's Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor compute. The report emphasizes the shift from demonstration stages to deployment platforms across work, security, and home settings.
